Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: Deal damage equal to your Attack.
Tag.zhCN: 造成等同于你的攻击力的伤害。

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: Choose an enemy. An adjacent enemy Attacks it.
Tag.zhCN: 选择一个敌人。使一个相邻敌人攻击它。

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: Choose an enemy. An adjacent enemy Attacks it.
Tag.zhCN: 选择一个敌人。使一个相邻敌人攻击它。

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: Choose an enemy. Adjacent enemies Attack it.
Tag.zhCN: 选择一个敌人。使相邻的敌人攻击它。

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: Choose an enemy. Adjacent enemies Attack it.
Tag.zhCN: 选择一个敌人。使相邻的敌人攻击它。

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: Choose an enemy. Adjacent enemies Attack it.
Tag.zhCN: 选择一个敌人。使相邻的敌人攻击它。

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: Gain +@ Attack for each friendly character that died this game.
Tag.zhCN: 在本局对战中，每有一个友方角色死亡，便获得+@攻击力。

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: Gain +@ Attack for each friendly character that died this game.
Tag.zhCN: 在本局对战中，每有一个友方角色死亡，便获得+@攻击力。

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: Gain +@ Attack for each friendly character that died this game.
Tag.zhCN: 在本局对战中，每有一个友方角色死亡，便获得+@攻击力。

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: Gain +@ Attack for each friendly character that died this game.
Tag.zhCN: 在本局对战中，每有一个友方角色死亡，便获得+@攻击力。

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: Gain +@ Attack for each friendly character that died this game.
Tag.zhCN: 在本局对战中，每有一个友方角色死亡，便获得+@攻击力。

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.zhCN: 亡语：随机对1个敌人造成等同于此佣兵攻击力的伤害。

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.zhCN: 亡语：随机对2个敌人造成等同于此佣兵攻击力的伤害。

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: Deathrattle: Deal damage_equal to this Merc's_Attack to all_enemies.
Tag.zhCN: 亡语：对所有敌人造成等同于此佣兵攻击力的伤害。

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: Deathrattle: Deal damage_equal to this Merc's_Attack to all_enemies.
Tag.zhCN: 亡语：对所有敌人造成等同于此佣兵攻击力的伤害。

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: Deal damage equal to this Merc's Attack.
Tag.zhCN: 造成等同于此佣兵攻击力的伤害。

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: Deal damage equal to this Merc's Attack.
Tag.zhCN: 造成等同于此佣兵攻击力的伤害。

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: Deal damage equal to this Merc's Attack.
Tag.zhCN: 造成等同于此佣兵攻击力的伤害。

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: Deal damage equal to this Merc's Attack.
Tag.zhCN: 造成等同于此佣兵攻击力的伤害。

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: Deal damage equal to this Merc's Attack.
Tag.zhCN: 造成等同于此佣兵攻击力的伤害。

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: Set an enemy's Attack to 3 this turn. Attack them.
Tag.zhCN: 在本回合中使一个敌人的攻击力变为3点。攻击该敌人。

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: Set an enemy's Attack to 2 this turn. Attack them.
Tag.zhCN: 在本回合中使一个敌人的攻击力变为2点。攻击该敌人。

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: Set an enemy's Attack to 1 this turn. Attack them.
Tag.zhCN: 在本回合中使一个敌人的攻击力变为1点。攻击该敌人。

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: Set an enemy's Attack to 1 this turn. Attack them.
Tag.zhCN: 在本回合中使一个敌人的攻击力变为1点。攻击该敌人。

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: Set an enemy's Attack to 1 this turn. Attack them.
Tag.zhCN: 在本回合中使一个敌人的攻击力变为1点。攻击该敌人。

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: Give a character +{0}/+{0} and Divine Shield.@Give a character +{0}/+{0} and Divine Shield. Give this Merc +{1}/+{1}.
Tag.zhCN: 使一个角色获得+{0}/+{0}和圣盾。@使一个角色获得+{0}/+{0}和圣盾。使此佣兵获得+{1}/+{1}。

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: Give a character +{0}/+{0} and Divine Shield.@Give a character +{0}/+{0} and Divine Shield. Give this Merc +{1}/+{1}.
Tag.zhCN: 使一个角色获得+{0}/+{0}和圣盾。@使一个角色获得+{0}/+{0}和圣盾。使此佣兵获得+{1}/+{1}。

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: Give a character +{0}/+{0} and Divine Shield.@Give a character +{0}/+{0} and Divine Shield. Give this Merc +{1}/+{1}.
Tag.zhCN: 使一个角色获得+{0}/+{0}和圣盾。@使一个角色获得+{0}/+{0}和圣盾。使此佣兵获得+{1}/+{1}。

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: Give a character +{0}/+{0} and Divine Shield.@Give a character +{0}/+{0} and Divine Shield. Give this Merc +{1}/+{1}.
Tag.zhCN: 使一个角色获得+{0}/+{0}和圣盾。@使一个角色获得+{0}/+{0}和圣盾。使此佣兵获得+{1}/+{1}。

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: Give a character +{0}/+{0} and Divine Shield.@Give a character +{0}/+{0} and Divine Shield. Give this Merc +{1}/+{1}.
Tag.zhCN: 使一个角色获得+{0}/+{0}和圣盾。@使一个角色获得+{0}/+{0}和圣盾。使此佣兵获得+{1}/+{1}。

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: Restore #@ Health to another friendly Merc. Whenever it takes damage this turn, this Merc takes it instead.
Tag.zhCN: 为另一名友方佣兵恢复#@点生命值。在本回合中，每当其受到伤害时，改为由此佣兵来承担。

Tag.name: TARGETING_ARROW_TEXT
Tag.enUS: Restore Health to another friendly Merc.
Tag.zhCN: 为另一名友方佣兵恢复生命值。

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: Restore #@ Health to another friendly Merc. Whenever it takes damage this turn, this Merc takes it instead.
Tag.zhCN: 为另一名友方佣兵恢复#@点生命值。在本回合中，每当其受到伤害时，改为由此佣兵来承担。

Tag.enUS: Restore Health to another friendly Merc.
Tag.zhCN: 为另一名友方佣兵恢复生命值。

Tag.enUS: Restore #@ Health to another friendly Merc. Whenever it takes damage this turn, this Merc takes it instead.
Tag.zhCN: 为另一名友方佣兵恢复#@点生命值。在本回合中，每当其受到伤害时，改为由此佣兵来承担。

Tag.enUS: Restore Health to another friendly Merc.
Tag.zhCN: 为另一名友方佣兵恢复生命值。

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.zhCN: 攻击一个敌人。击杀：获得圣盾。

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: Attack an enemy. Deathblow: Give this Merc and_a_random neighbor_Divine_Shield.
Tag.zhCN: 攻击一个敌人。击杀：使此佣兵和随机一个相邻角色获得圣盾。

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.zhCN: 攻击一个敌人。击杀：使你的角色获得圣盾。

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.zhCN: 攻击一个敌人。击杀：使你的角色获得圣盾。

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.zhCN: 攻击一个敌人。击杀：使你的角色获得圣盾。

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: Attack the left and right-most enemies. Deathblow: Restore #{0} Health to this Merc.@[x]Attack the left-most enemy twice and the right-most enemy once. Deathblow:_Restore #7 Health to this Merc.
Tag.zhCN: 攻击最左边和最右边的敌人。击杀：为此佣兵恢复#{0}点生命值。@攻击最左边的敌人两次，最右边的敌人一次。击杀：为此佣兵恢复#7点生命值。

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: Attack the left and right-most enemies. Deathblow: Restore #{0} Health to this Merc.@[x]Attack the left-most enemy twice and the right-most enemy once. Deathblow:_Restore #14 Health to this Merc.
Tag.zhCN: 攻击最左边和最右边的敌人。击杀：为此佣兵恢复#{0}点生命值。@攻击最左边的敌人两次，最右边的敌人一次。击杀：为此佣兵恢复#14点生命值。

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: Attack the left and right-most enemies. Deathblow: Restore #{0} Health to this Merc.@[x]Attack the left-most enemy twice and the right-most enemy once. Deathblow:_Restore #21 Health to this Merc.
Tag.zhCN: 攻击最左边和最右边的敌人。击杀：为此佣兵恢复#{0}点生命值。@攻击最左边的敌人两次，最右边的敌人一次。击杀：为此佣兵恢复#21点生命值。

Tag.name: CARDTEXT

Tag.zhCN: 攻击最左边和最右边的敌人。击杀：为此佣兵恢复#{0}点生命值。@攻击最左边的敌人两次，最右边的敌人一次。击杀：为此佣兵恢复#23点生命值。

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: Attack the left and right-most enemies. Deathblow: Restore #{0} Health to this Merc.@[x]Attack the left-most enemy twice and the right-most enemy once. Deathblow:_Restore #{0} Health to this Merc.
Tag.zhCN: 攻击最左边和最右边的敌人。击杀：为此佣兵恢复#{0}点生命值。@攻击最左边的敌人两次，最右边的敌人一次。击杀：为此佣兵恢复#{0}点生命值。

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: Deal damage equal to this Merc's Attack to 1_random_enemy.
Tag.zhCN: 随机对1个敌人造成等同于此佣兵攻击力的伤害。

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: Deal damage equal to this Merc's Attack to 2_random_enemies.
Tag.zhCN: 随机对2个敌人造成等同于此佣兵攻击力的伤害。

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: Deal damage equal to this Merc's Attack to 3_random_enemies.
Tag.zhCN: 随机对3个敌人造成等同于此佣兵攻击力的伤害。

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: Deal damage equal to this Merc's Attack to 3_random_enemies.
Tag.zhCN: 随机对3个敌人造成等同于此佣兵攻击力的伤害。

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: Deal damage equal to this Merc's Attack to 3_random_enemies.
Tag.zhCN: 随机对3个敌人造成等同于此佣兵攻击力的伤害。

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: [x]Attack an enemy. If it's the left or right-most enemy, gain +@ Attack.
Tag.zhCN: 攻击一个敌人。如果目标为最左边或最右边的敌人，便获得+@攻击力。

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: [x]Attack an enemy. If it's the left or right-most enemy, gain +@ Attack.
Tag.zhCN: 攻击一个敌人。如果目标为最左边或最右边的敌人，便获得+@攻击力。

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: [x]Attack an enemy. If it's the left or right-most enemy, gain +@ Attack.
Tag.zhCN: 攻击一个敌人。如果目标为最左边或最右边的敌人，便获得+@攻击力。

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: [x]Attack an enemy. If it's the left or right-most enemy, gain +@ Attack.
Tag.zhCN: 攻击一个敌人。如果目标为最左边或最右边的敌人，便获得+@攻击力。

Tag.enUS: [x]Attack an enemy. If it's the left or right-most enemy, gain +@ Attack.
Tag.zhCN: 攻击一个敌人。如果目标为最左边或最右边的敌人，便获得+@攻击力。

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: Gain Taunt and this takes {0} less damage this turn.@This Merc takes {0} less damage, gains Taunt, and cannot be Critically Damaged this turn.@This Merc takes {0} less damage, gains Taunt, and cannot be Critically Damaged this turn.@This Merc takes {0} less damage, gains Taunt, and cannot be Critically Damaged this turn.
Tag.zhCN: 在本回合中获得嘲讽且受到的伤害减少{0}点。@在本回合中，此佣兵受到的伤害减少{0}点，获得嘲讽且不会受到暴击伤害。@在本回合中，此佣兵受到的伤害减少{0}点，获得嘲讽且不会受到暴击伤害。@在本回合中，此佣兵受到的伤害减少{0}点，获得嘲讽且不会受到暴击伤害。

Tag.zhCN: 在本回合中获得嘲讽且受到的伤害减少{0}点。@在本回合中，此佣兵受到的伤害减少{0}点，获得嘲讽且不会受到暴击伤害。@在本回合中，此佣兵受到的伤害减少{0}点，获得嘲讽且不会受到暴击伤害。@在本回合中，此佣兵受到的伤害减少{0}点，获得嘲讽且不会受到暴击伤害。

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: Deal ${0} damage to a character and ${1} damage to adjacent ones.
Tag.zhCN: 对一个角色造成${0}点伤害，并对其相邻角色造成${1}点伤害。

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: Deal ${0} damage to a character and ${1} damage to adjacent ones.
Tag.zhCN: 对一个角色造成${0}点伤害，并对其相邻角色造成${1}点伤害。

Tag.zhCN: 对一个角色造成${0}点伤害，并对其相邻角色造成${1}点伤害。

Tag.zhCN: 对一个角色造成${0}点伤害，并对其相邻角色造成${1}点伤害。

Tag.zhCN: 对一个角色造成${0}点伤害，并对其相邻角色造成${1}点伤害。

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: Deal ${0} damage to all enemies.@Deal ${0} damage to all enemies. They lose Stealth.
Tag.zhCN: 对所有敌人造成${0}点伤害。@对所有敌人造成${0}点伤害，并使其失去潜行。

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.zhCN: 造成$@点伤害。击杀：施放加拉克苏斯之拳1。

Tag.zhCN: 造成$@点伤害。击杀：施放加拉克苏斯之拳4。

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.zhCN: 造成${0}点伤害。击杀：施放加拉克苏斯之拳{1}。

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: Deal ${0} damage to a random enemy. Repeat for each of your other Legion characters.@Deal ${0} damage to the lowest Health enemy. Repeat for each of your other Legion characters.
Tag.zhCN: 随机对一个敌人造成${0}点伤害。每有一个你的其他军团角色，重复一次。@对生命值最低的敌人造成${0}点伤害。每有一个你的其他军团角色，重复一次。

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: Deal ${0} damage to a random enemy. Repeat for each of your other Legion characters.@Deal ${0} damage to the lowest Health enemy. Repeat for each of your other Legion characters.
